Title: Relates to owner liability for failure of an operator to comply with stopping requirements at intersections in violation of section 1174 of the vehicle and traffic law
Summary: Relates to owner liability for failure of an operator to comply with stopping requirements at intersections in violation of section 1174 of the vehicle and traffic law; relats to access to records.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law and public officers law, in relation to establishing a demonstration program implementing intersection monitoring systems and owner liability for failure of an operator to comply with stopping requirements at intersections; and providing for the repeal of certain provisions upon expiration thereof
